title: Split Array into Fibonacci Sequence
titleCn: 将数组拆分成斐波那契序列

testcases.input: num = "1101111" Output: [11,0,11,11] Explanation: The output [110, 1, 111] would also be accepted.
testcases.expectedOutput: [11,0,11,11] Explanation: The output [110, 1, 111] would also be accepted.

testcases.input: num = "0123" Output: [] Explanation: Leading zeroes are not allowed, so "01", "2", "3" is not valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explanation: Leading zeroes are not allowed, so "01", "2", "3" is not valid.
